scripts.format: find . -name "*.js" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v build | xargs prettier --write
scripts.format:log: find . -name "*.js" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v build | xargs prettier
scripts.clean:git: cd web-react-ts && rm -f ./.git/index.lock && cd ../api && rm -f ./.git/index.lock && cd .. && rm -f ./.git/index.lock
scripts.release:major: npm run clean:git && node scripts/release.js major
scripts.release:minor: npm run clean:git && node scripts/release.js minor
scripts.release:patch: npm run clean:git && node scripts/release.js patch
scripts.test: concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "cd api && npm test" "cd web-react-ts && npm run test:run"
